_comment_paths: Paste the `mcpServers.defi-risk` block below into your Claude Desktop config.
If the file does not exist yet, create it with the full JSON object below.
_comment_invocation: (A) npx — recommended for end users; no clone required.
(B) Local build — recommended for contributors. The shipped example uses
this pattern; replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_REPO with the path on your box.
_comment_env: All env keys mirror .env.example. Required: ALCHEMY_API_KEY, ETHERSCAN_API_KEY.
Tools missing required keys return a structured `missing_credentials` error
rather than crashing the server — see docs/INSTALL.md Troubleshooting.
